long_description:
[TEL] NGDC count in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar no output records is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/tel_host_qradar_agent_troubleshooting.html
TIP Short Description: us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-zone-control some hosts running NGDC in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar agents have had no output records for the past hour
TIP Situation: NGDC count in-cluster systemd fluentbit-qradar no output records
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-zone-control::

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:

Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-zone-control'
